prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `310f3251`.
codex_response:
Implemented `310f3251` in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_310f3251/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_310f3251/generator.py#L25), and [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_310f3251/__init__.py#L1). The rule is: place color `2` one cell diagonally up-left of each nonzero input cell with wraparound inside the base grid, only onto background cells, then tile that marked base grid `3x3`. The generator matches the family by sampling small square `2x2` to `5x5` sparse grids with one foreground color and one or two points, which reproduces the official size/count/color profile. No new primitive was needed.

I kept the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the Sonnet hint as misleading; that is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_310f3251/notes.md#L1). Verification passed on the official task (`6/6`) and on generated data (`1000/1000`). Artifacts were built at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/310f3251/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/310f3251/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/310f3251/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/310f3251/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/310f3251/previews/preview_03.png).
